subject: NEW FEATURE: Organizer Messaging System - Coordination Request
body:
Hi Quinn,

Toby has requested a new Organizer Messaging System. I've drafted a design doc and messaged Fulton.

## Summary
- Admin sends messages to organizers (errors, updates, announcements)
- Storage: Firestore (not MongoDB) - ties to Firebase auth
- Frontend: Pop-up on role switch + right-drawer for history
- Backend: Possibly minimal (Firestore handles most)

## Design Doc Location
`tangotiempo.com/docs/ORGANIZER-MESSAGING-SYSTEM-DESIGN.md`

## Admin Message Creation Options
Toby mentioned three possibilities:
1. New mini admin app
2. CalOps dashboard (Dash's domain)
3. Directly in Firebase console

## Coordination Needed
- Fulton: Firestore schema + security rules
- Dash (if CalOps): Admin UI for message creation
- Sarah: Frontend pop-up + drawer

## JIRA Status
JIRA was unavailable when I tried to create tickets. Will retry.

Please review the design doc and help coordinate with Dash if CalOps is the admin path.

- Sarah
